headline: Carnival Jumps 9%, Norwegian Cruise Line Soars 11%: Why Royal Caribbean Isn’t Joining the Cruise Party
summary: Shares of Carnival (NYSE:CCL) are up 9% in midday trading Wednesday while Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) is rallying 11%. Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) isn’t joining the party, with RCL stock only up 2% on the session. The divergence is the story. All three cruise names have been pummeled over the past month, with CCL stock ... Carnival Jumps 9%, Norwegian Cruise Line Soars 11%: Why Royal Caribbean Isn’t Joining the Cruise Party

headline: Royal Caribbean and Affirm to bring flexible and transparent payment options to travellers in UK and Canada
summary: LONDON & TORONTO, May 20, 2026--UK and Canadian holidaymakers booking with Royal Caribbean can now spread the cost of their cruise over time without compounding interest or late fees, following a new partnership with payment network Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM).
